params.amount: For aave/morpho: USDC amount to withdraw.               For uniswap/aerodrome/lido: token amount to sell back (WETH/AERO/wstETH atoms).

forwardSwap(address,address,uint24,uint2.notice: Swap USDC → tokenOut via Uniswap V3 (fee tier; 0 → 3000). Sends tokenOut to user.

forwardSwapAero(address,address,uint256).notice: Swap USDC → tokenOut via Aerodrome (volatile route). Sends tokenOut to user.
